description: Component & Life Tracker — tracks component time remaining, overhaul intervals, life-limited parts, and on-condition monitoring with alerts before limits are reached

hard_stops.label: Component Life Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: A component has exceeded its TBO or hard life limit — must be removed from service

hard_stops.label: LLP Cycle Limit Reached
hard_stops.logic: A life-limited part has reached or exceeded its cycle limit — must be removed from service

hard_stops.label: Component No Traceability
hard_stops.logic: A component lacks traceability documentation (missing FAA 8130-3 or equivalent) — cannot be installed or remain in service

soft_flags.label: Component Approaching TBO
soft_flags.logic: A component is within 100 flight hours of its time-between-overhaul limit

soft_flags.label: LLP Approaching Limit
soft_flags.logic: A life-limited part is within 10% of its cycle limit

soft_flags.label: On-Condition Trend Adverse
soft_flags.logic: An on-condition component is showing an adverse trend in monitoring data (oil consumption, vibration, etc.)
